name: Tabpane — Tab Manager
description: See, search, organize, and save your open tabs. Drag tabs between windows, name windows, save sessions, and view Chrome tab groups.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: default-src 'none'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self'; img-src 'self' data:; font-src 'self'; connect-src 'none'; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'none'; form-action 'none'; frame-ancestors 'none'
